mapper.select: SELECT waybill_id FROM t_receive_order_waybill where receive_order_id = #{receiveOrderId}

SELECT trow.receive_amount amount, ro.shipper_id FROM t_receive_order_waybill trow LEFT JOIN t_receive_order ro ON ro.receive_order_id = trow.receive_order_id WHERE ro.make_invoice_flag = #{makeInvoiceFlag} AND ro.check_status = #{checkStatus} AND trow.waybill_id IN
#{id}
